ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date when the race is scheduled */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race location */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race type */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of race (e.g., flat, harness) */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money awarded for the race */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Status of the race (e.g., scheduled, in-progress, completed, canceled) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "track_condition" TEXT /* Track condition during the race */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the race in meters */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Scheduled start time of the race */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Actual end time of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES race_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the horse */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the horse */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the horse */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the horse was registered with the organization */,
  "last_race_date" TEXT /* Date of the horse's last race */,
  "last_race_performance" TEXT /* Summary of the horse's performance in the last race */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer responsible for the horse */,
  "vet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the veterinarian responsible for the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_vet_id FOREIGN KEY ("vet_id") REFERENCES vets ("vet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the trainer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the trainer */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level (e.g., novice, expert) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the trainer registered with the organization */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., flat racing, harness racing) */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race in which the horse is competing */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse entering the race */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jockey riding the horse */,
  "post_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the horse in the race */,
  "finishing_time" REAL /* Finishing time of the horse in the race */,
  "sp" REAL /* Speed rating of the horse in the race */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight the horse is required to carry in the race */,
  "odds" REAL /* Odds of the horse winning the race */,
  "entry_status" TEXT /* Status of the race entry (e.g., confirmed, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_jockey_id FOREIGN KEY ("jockey_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_entries_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the bet */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race on which the bet is placed */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse the bet is placed on */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money bet */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet (e.g., win, place, show) */,
  "bet_status" TEXT /* Current status of the bet (e.g., pending, settled) */,
  "bet_date" TEXT /* Date when the bet was placed */,
  "bet_time" TEXT /* Time when the bet was placed */,
  "payout" REAL /* Amount of money won or lost from the bet (if settled) */,
  "wager_type" TEXT /* Type of wager (e.g., straight, exacta, trifecta) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the user for betting */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race for which the result is recorded */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse that finished in this position */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position the horse finished in (1st, 2nd, etc.) */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Prize money awarded for the position */,
  "odds" REAL /* Odds of the horse at the start of the race */,
  "winnings" REAL /* Total winnings from the race (if any) */,
  "performance_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the horse's performance in the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the race location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the race location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the race location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the race type (e.g., Flat, Harness) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race type */,
  "min_distance" INTEGER /* Minimum distance for the race type */,
  "max_distance" INTEGER /* Maximum distance for the race type */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed for the race type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting history record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the bet */,
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bet made */,
  "bet_date" TEXT /* Date when the bet was placed */,
  "bet_time" TEXT /* Time when the bet was placed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the bet (e.g., won, lost) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_history_bet_id FOREIGN KEY ("bet_id") REFERENCES betting ("bet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vets" (
  "vet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each veterinarian */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the veterinarian */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the veterinarian */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., equine medicine, surgery) */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the veterinarian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jockeys" (
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jockey */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the jockey */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the jockey */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the jockey */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level (e.g., novice, expert) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the jockey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jockey_id")
)
